title: NIJISANJI EN Resource Pack
description: This is an Official NIJISANJI EN Resource Pack, produced and organized by Selen Tatsuki, which implements a variety of NIJISANJI EN themed features as well as original voice acting from EN members. This resource pack requires mods that support CIT and CEM.
body:
# NIJISANJI EN: Resource Pack

The NIJISANJI EN Resource Pack is an Official NIJISANJI EN project, produced and organized by [Selen Tatsuki](https://www.youtube.com/@SelenTatsuki), which implements a variety of custom NIJISANJI EN themed retextured and remodelled items and entities, custom OBSYDIA member themed GUI. As well as featuring original voice acting from NIJISANJI EN Members!

# Installation Guide

There are 2 ways to install this pack for it to work properly. The first is an [OptiFine Install](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-OSRP-GUIDE/blob/main/OptiFine_Guide.md), which is a simple easy method for those new to modded Minecraft, and the second a [Fabric Install](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-OSRP-GUIDE/blob/main/Fabric_Guide.md) for those who use other mods or don't like Optifine. We recommend using Optifine! 

The [Guide](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-RP-GUIDE/) here will show you how to do both, or alternatively you can watch the YouTube Install Videos.
### OptiFine

[OptiFine Install Guide](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-OSRP-GUIDE/blob/main/OptiFine_Guide.md)

[OptiFine Install Video](https://youtu.be/dTARzDoH3G4)

### Fabric

[Fabric Install Guide](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-OSRP-GUIDE/blob/main/Fabric_Guide.md)

[Fabric Install Video](https://youtu.be/bP8GbL3KTiA)

# Contents

![Banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1123140578666889276/1130802495304781824/ModrinthBanner.png)

## **NIJISANJI EN MOBS**

[Requires CEM support] OSRP turns the following mobs into your favorite NIJISANJI EN Talents, featuring original voice lines provided by them!

![Selen Bear](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1123140578666889276/1130806705744248922/SelenBearT.png)
![Rosemi Golem](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1123140578666889276/1130806705509376040/RosemiGolemT.png)
![Petra Golem](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1123140578666889276/1130806706004312084/PetraGolemT.png)

- Pomu Allay
- Finana Drowned
- Elira Ender Dragon
- Selen Polar Bear
- Rosemi Iron Golem
- Petra Snow Golem
- Dragoon Pillager
- Pentomo Turtle
- Rosebud Villager
- Reimu Vex

## **Custom Re-Nameable Items**
Requires CIT support. Items can be renamed in-game at an anvil to display new textures. (Case insensitive)

OBSYDIA Members Armor
Rename an armor piece (iron, diamond or netherite) by adding a member name (Selen, Rosemi, Petra), to display the corresponding armor.
- "____ helmet"
- "____ chestplate"
- "____ leggings"
- "____ boots"

OBSYDIA Cookies
Rename a cookie to display an OBSYDIA-themed cookie
- "petra cookie"
- "selen cookie"
- "rosemi cookie"

OBSYDIA Elytra
Rename an Elytra to display an OBSYDIA-themed set of wings
- "petra elytra"
- "selen elytra"
- "rosemi elytra"

Colored Glowsticks
Rename a stick to display a colored glowstick
- "blue glow stick"
- "cyan glow stick"
- "green glow stick"
- "magenta glow stick"
- "orange glow stick"
- "purple glow stick"
- "red glow stick"
- "yellow glow stick"


OBSYDIA Pie
Rename a pie to display an OBSYDIA-themed pie
- "petra pie"
- "selen pie"
- "rosemi pie"

OBSYDIA Mascot Shield
Rename a shield to display an OBSYDIA mascot-themed shield
- "pentomo shield"
- "dragoon shield"
- "rosebud shield"

Rosemi Totem of Undying
Rename a totem of undying to display a Rosemi-themed totem
- "rose totem"
- "rosemi totem"

## **Music Discs**
Custom disc textures & lo-fi renditions of original NIJISANJI music
- Diamond City Lights
- Black Out
- God sees all - [keiki_](https://twitter.com/keiki_music)
- Hope in the dark
- Stuck In The Abyss
- Lets Get It Started
- HOLD IT DOWN

## **Paintings**
Featured NIJISANJI fanart
- "#Artsuki" - [釜飯轟々丸](https://twitter.com/kamamesigogo123)
- "1st Anniversary" - [syan](https://twitter.com/syannyannyan)
- "Alban" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "Elira" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "Luca" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "Meloco" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "NIJISANJI EN THE MOVIE" - [釜飯轟々丸](https://twitter.com/kamamesigogo123)
- "Nina" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "OBSYDIA!!!" - [aki](https://twitter.com/_kimsugi)
- "Peto Peto Penguin" - [Craymer](https://twitter.com/Cr4ymer)
- "Ren" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "Rosemi" - [Zoggga](https://twitter.com/Zoggga)
- "SELEN!!!" - [HARUSHURURU](https://twitter.com/AsukaKojou)
- "Stars & Roses" - [Akemono](https://twitter.com/papercider)
- "Submit To Rosemi-SAMA" - [Senki](https://twitter.com/kawaue7)


# Requirements
OptiFine features CEM & CIT support, so no additional mods are needed. The [Guide](https://github.com/NBeeCC/NIJI-EN-RP-GUIDE/) will show you how to install (click the little blue text). Or alternatively you can watch the [YouTube Tutorial](https://youtu.be/dTARzDoH3G4)

- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)


### **[Non-OptiFine Installation]**
If you are not using OptFine (i.e. you are a Sodium, Fabric/Quilt user), install the following mods and their dependencies/requirements instead:

- [Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/)
